Slots (×6): Place fresh herbs — they dry passively over time. Use 'Grind All' to mill every dried or millable item at once. Water Tank: Drag a water container to add a Water Charge (up to 8), or drag a river, pond, or stream card directly (1 charge, 15 min). Drag an empty clay bowl to draw cold water back out. Light the stove to heat the water for tea brewing.
